arts.ttl: Crystal Palace's FA Cup hero Dean Henderson leads fans in X-rated chant as stars begin boozy night of celebrations after beating Man City to win FIRST major trophy
arts.sum: Dean Henderson led an X-rated chant as Crystal Palace players joined supporters to toast their shock FA Cup victory at Wembley on Saturday night.

arts.ttl: Oliver Glasner reveals what Prince William told him after Crystal Palace's FA Cup success over Man City - three weeks after his side knocked out his beloved Aston Villa
arts.sum: Of course William had to suffer from a distance at the end of April as he was unable to witness the 3-0 loss first-hand, instead attending the funeral for the late Pope Francis in Vatican City.

arts.ttl: Tinkering Pep Guardiola was outthought by Crystal Palace boss Oliver Glasner, writes JACK GAUGHAN, after Wembley defeat leaves Man City trophyless
arts.sum: JACK GAUGHAN AT WEMBLEY: There have been many occasions over Guardiola's nine years in England that time has run away with him down one of the corridors along the Etihad Stadium's tunnel.

arts.ttl: Man City will take flak for losing but Crystal Palace manager Oliver Glasner proves you don't need to spend big to grab glory, writes DANNY MURPHY
arts.sum: DANNY MURPHY: Crystal Palace's triumph at Wembley is a reminder you don't always need the biggest chequebook if you're smart on player and managerial recruitment.

arts.ttl: Eberechi Eze fires Crystal Palace to FA Cup glory against Man City
arts.sum: Eze put Palace ahead with their first attack of the match before an inspired Dean Henderson saved Omar Marmoush’s penalty.

arts.ttl: Ian Wright and Wayne Rooney lead fury at VAR controversy in FA Cup final: ‘Absolutely pathetic’
arts.sum: After Crystal Palace goalkeeper Dean Henderson remained on the pitch against Man City, Rooney, Wright and a host of pundits reacted furiously to the decision of VAR Jarred Gillett
